editorial_note: APPROVE_WITH_CORRECTIONS. All claims verified against primary sources. The sole flag is allowlist coverage: docs.mesa3d.org, gamingonlinux.com, khronos.org, and linuxcompatible.org are not yet on the allowlist but are all credible and primary for this subject area. Recommended adding them in this batch. VirGL description as 'OpenGL-over-Vulkan layer' is a minor imprecision (it is a virtualized GL driver, not a general translation layer like Zink), but not materially misleading and not a blocker.
